transcripts.transcript: Alice: Sprint 14 retro. We hit 60% test coverage, target was 70. Bob: I'll add the missing integration tests by Friday. Carol: We decided to upgrade to Postgres 16 next sprint. Alice: Action — Bob owns the test backfill, Carol owns the Postgres migration plan.

Dan: For the rate limiter, I propose token bucket. Eve: Agreed, leaky bucket gave us tail-latency issues last quarter. Dan: Decision — token bucket, 1000 rps per tenant. Eve: I'll write the RFC by next Monday and circulate it.
Frank: Quick FYI — the deploy went out clean. No issues. Grace: Cool, thanks for the heads up. End of meeting.
